title: phyllanthus frazieri
intro: Phyllanthus frazieri, also known as Frazier's phyllanthus, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of the world and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Phyllanthus frazieri is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
